content: Use reporting_inventory for owned-knife questions. Fields: inventory_id, knife_model_id, knife_name, knife_type, family_name, form_name, series_name, collaborator_name, quantity, acquired_date, purchase_price, steel, blade_finish, blade_color, handle_color, handle_type, blade_length, location, notes, msrp.

Use reporting_models for catalog/model questions. Fields: model_id, official_name, knife_type, family_name, form_name, series_name, collaborator_name, steel, blade_finish, handle_type, blade_length, msrp.

Questions about what the user owns use reporting_inventory. Questions about the full MKC catalog use reporting_models. Missing-model and completion-cost questions usually compare inventory against catalog, but the canonical plan should still make scope explicit.
